title: Disambiguate a common member name
prompt: Find all usages of the key property on Feature, not every key in the repo. List each call site with file path and line number.
expectations: Resolves the member with containingType or fileHint before scanning usages
Result set is scoped to Feature.key — does not include unrelated types
Does not use raw text search (grep/rg) as the primary identity mechanism
Reports at least 3 distinct usage sites with file paths
